descriptor.name: lambda_vac1: TESA SG-L vacuum wavelength, nm
lambda_vac2: TESA SG-O vacuum wavelength, nm
lambda_vac3: Spectra 117A-1 HeNe vacuum wavelength, nm
pv: partial pressure of water vapor, Pa. pv=h * f_enh * svp
n: refractive index of air (Ciddor / Birch-Downs)
m: integer fringe order (method of exact fractions)
alpha: thermal expansion coefficient of tungsten carbide, K^-1
L_nom: nominal gauge block length (7 mm), nm
deltaL: length deviation from nominal, nm
